description: replace ReLU squared with GELU activation
SwiGLU MLP (gated linear unit with SiLU)
increase aspect ratio from 64 to 96 (wider model)
halve batch size to 8K tokens (more steps)
set final LR fraction to 0.1 (not zero)
cosine LR decay instead of linear warmdown
increase device batch size to 64 (no grad accum)
weight tying (assertion error in optimizer setup)
wider SwiGLU MLP (4x instead of 8/3x hidden)
GQA + depth=7 (7 heads not divisible by 3)
increase VE gate channels from 32 to 64
smaller SwiGLU MLP (3x instead of 4x base)
constant weight decay instead of linear decay
increase Muon initial momentum from 0.85 to 0.9
increase RoPE base frequency from 10000 to 50000
reduce final LR fraction from 0.1 to 0.05
reduce VE gate channels from 32 to 16
VE on all layers instead of alternating
